marshallese.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: ray diagrams, Snell's law, mirrors, lenses, interference, diffraction, polarization. Sims iturin doon + calculators.
marshallese.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Rainbows · mirages · after-images · color · polarized sky
marshallese.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ optical scientists jān etto ñan rainin
marshallese.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Lasers, vision, color, astronomy + bar jet
marshallese.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Trivia · records · quotes · safety · data · teaching tips
marshallese.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Concept progress + questions ko kwaar kadedeḷọki
marshallese.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Snell's law sandbox — aikuji TIR + dispersion
marshallese.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Refraction — Snell's law + total internal reflection
marshallese.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lenses — converging + diverging, thin lens equation
marshallese.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Angle ej eḷḷā jān critical angle. Ejjeḷọk light ej deḷọñ — aolep rej jepḷaak. Eñin pedped in fiber optics, meram in diamond, prism periscopes.
marshallese.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: Epaak ñan TIR boundary. Refracted ray ej etal epaak surface; transmitted intensity ej wanlaḷḷọk.
marshallese.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Light ej deḷọñ ilo denser medium (n₁ < n₂). Refracted ray ej ip ÑAN normal — light eruṃwij ilo dense medium.
marshallese.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Light ej deḷọñ ilo less-dense medium. Refracted ray ej ip ETTOḶỌK jān normal — light eṃōkaj ilo light medium.
marshallese.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Angle epen jān normal. Elōñ energy ej jepḷaak (Fresnel ej wanlōñḷọk), edik ej deḷọñ.
marshallese.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Snell's Law Inquiry — Refraction, TIR, Dispersion
marshallese.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Kōṃṃan n₁, n₂, incidence angle, im wavelength. Aikuji ia eo system ej oktak jān refraction ñan TIR. Ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk reveal.
marshallese.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Hypothesis eo aṃ (ia eo TIR ej jino ie, im etke diamond ej TIR eḷapḷọk jān glass?)
marshallese.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: waanjoñak, diamond ewōr critical angle ~24° ak glass ~42°, kōn menin jabdewōt angle epen ej TIR...
marshallese.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Ij jaḷ — kwaḷọk questions ko rōpeḷḷọk
marshallese.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Etke ejjeḷọk critical angle ñe kwōj etal jān less-dense ñan more-dense?
marshallese.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Kōṃṃan water→air (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Ta critical angle eo? Etke ek rej lo laḷ eo eṃōj kobaik ilo juon cone ilōñ?
marshallese.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Ilo juon rainbow, etke būrōrō ej ip edikḷọk jān buḷuḷ? Kobaik ñan wavelength slider.
marshallese.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Ewi wāween an prism kōjepel white light ñe aolep wavelengths rej loore Snell's law eo wōt?
marshallese.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Imaroñ kōmḷeḷeik etke n₁/n₂/θ combination in ej kōṃṃan refraction state in.
marshallese.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk reveal, ejjeḷọk answer dump. Dispersion model ej illustrative (Cauchy-like first-order); dispersion curves ṃool rej material-specific (Sellmeier coefficients).
